MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Eric Throne. There being no appearance by either party, the matter is taken off calendar and the trial date is vacated.
